entities.name: RICE
entities.description: The primary crop studied in the rice-wheat cropping system

entities.name: WHEAT
entities.description: The second crop in the rice-wheat cropping system

entities.name: CONSERVATION AGRICULTURE
entities.description: An agricultural approach aimed at sustainability, referred to as CA

entities.name: SUB-SURFACE DRIP IRRIGATION
entities.description: An irrigation method delivering water below the soil surface, referred to as SSD

entities.name: CA+
entities.description: The combined application of conservation agriculture and sub-surface drip irrigation

entities.name: PUDDLED TRANSPLANTING
entities.description: The conventional method of rice establishment, referred to as PTR

entities.name: NITROGEN
entities.description: A key nutrient applied at various doses to improve crop performance

entities.name: WATER-USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The efficiency with which a crop uses water, referred to as WUE

entities.name: NITROGEN USE-EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The efficiency with which a crop uses nitrogen, referred to as NUE

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced per unit area

entities.name: BIOMASS
entities.description: The total mass of biological material produced by the crop

entities.name: NITROGEN UPTAKE
entities.description: The amount of nitrogen absorbed by the plant

entities.name: NITROGEN REMOBILIZATION
entities.description: The movement of nitrogen from vegetative parts to the grain

entities.name: FERTILE TILLERS
entities.description: The number of tillers that produce grain

entities.name: BENEFIT-COST RATIO
entities.description: An economic indicator of profitability

entities.name: INDO-GANGETIC PLAINS
entities.description: The geographical region in South Asia where the study is focused

entities.name: SOUTH ASIA
entities.description: The broader region containing the Indo-Gangetic plains

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the field experiment was conducted

entities.name: WATER SCARCITY
entities.description: The lack of sufficient water resources for irrigation

entities.name: GROUNDWATER DEPLETION
entities.description: The unsustainable over-drafting of groundwater resources

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to sufficient and nutritious food

entities.name: SUSTAINABILITY
entities.description: The ability to maintain agricultural productivity without depleting resources

relationships.description: part of the same cropping system
